##MEMBER JES2PARM
/*****PROPRIETARY-STATEMENT*******************************************/
/*     LICENSED MATERIALS-PROPERTY OF IBM                            */
/*****END-OF-PROPRIETARY-STATEMENT************************************/
/*                           *---------------------------------------*
                             *    Checkpoint Parameters              *
                             *---------------------------------------*
                                                                     */
CKPTDEF  CKPT1=(DSNAME=SYS1.BES2.HASPCKPT,
                             /* NAME FOR CKPT &DSNPRFX           ONC*/
         VOLSER=BES2W1,      /* SYS1.BES2.HASPCKPT               ONC*/
         INUSE=YES),         /*                                   onc*/
         DUPLEX=ON           /* NO DUPLEXING        &CHKPT2       NC*/
/*                                                                   */
CKPTSPACE BERTNUM=6500,      /* Number of BERTs                    oc*/
          BERTWARN=80        /* $HASP050 threshold for BERTs    ohwnc*/
/*                            *--------------------------------------*
                              *    Functional Subsystem Definition   *
                              *--------------------------------------*
                                                                     */
FSS(PRINTOFF)                /* FSS TOKEN FOR PRINTERNN FSS=    aownc*/
/*       PROC=PRINT,            FSS PROCEDURE TO START FSA       ownc*/
/*       HASPFSSM=HASPFSSM      FSS Load Module FSS Support      ownc*/
INIT(1)  NAME=1,             /* INITIATOR NAME                    wnc*/
         CLASS=QE,           /* INITIAL JOB CLASSES              ownc*/
         START               /* Start Automatically               wnc*/
INCLUDE DSNAME=SYS1.BES2.PARMLIB(JES2NJE),VOLSER=BES2W1
##MEMBER JES2NJE
/*              *--------------------------------------*
                |    NETWORK SERVER DEFINITIONS        |
                *--------------------------------------*
                                                                     */
NETSRV(1)  SOCKET=LOCAL
NODE(1)    NAME=SYSP,PATHMGR=NO,NETSRV=1
/*                                                                   */
SOCKET(SYSP) IPADDR=SYSP.BMC.COM,
             PORT=175,
             NODE=1
